name: Monon - The World Looks Red | Minus Twelve
description:
"For the grief of innocent soul."

— Monon Mallorie

"Monon!!? W-What happened to you again!?"

"It's nothing. Thanks for asking."

"But the blood!! Y-You can just let me help with your job!"

"You know that's what you asking on everybody."

"Because I really want to help!"

"You want to help everyone, aren't you?

Let's just let it go, kay?"

"F-Fine... I'll be looking out forward then."

"Good luck."

Personal Info

Monon Mallorie | 35 | 176cm.

Monon is another Adventurer but somehow more in terms of stern and seriousness. She ranked as Grandmaster by now. She does not had any so bad past life. Beside the lost of her adoptive family by the Great Calamity (not the 1204 ago).

Monon used to live in countryside, working in farm with her adoptive parents. Everything went so over when the Great Calamity. It trigger animals in farm and Monon has to watch her parents get slime alive by animals. From then, she became Adventurer, not from anger but determination. If anything like that happen again, she wouldn't stay still.

Magic : Psychic

Blood Manipulation

Monon capable of manipulating blood, both herself and other. This ability can applied by direct contact only. So this mean if you bleeding and she touch you, it's just over.

Universal Information

(Please important)

Power in this verse basically just magic. There are 11 different main type of them. And here they are if wondering:

Elemental Magic - Fire, water, electric, earth, wind, light and dark. Simple.

Illusion Magic - Illusion.

Summon Magic - Illusion but real. Make things out of your mind.

Time Magic - Time, but work in specific area. Not effect globally.

Holy Magic - Healing, shielding, yeah.

Curse Magic - Opposite with holy.

Gravity Magic - Gravity.

Dimension Magic - Teleportation stuffs.

Psychic Magic - Mind, essence and potential. It's about presence and what you are, not lifting things.

Spirit Magic - Necromancy things but a bit deeper in this verse. So this is op.

Binding Magic - Sealing, magic or movement. Sealing anything at your condition will. Like silence skill in games.
creator: ufoCrozzCross
